title: Crust Butter Cookies
description: A classic butter cookie recipe with a crunchy crust and a subtle sweetness. Perfect for snacking or as a dessert.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, followed by the vanilla extract.
Gradually mix in the crust until a dough forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place the cookies on the prepared baking sheet, leaving 1 inch of space between each cookie.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
